Mystic Dragon
Grunt Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit deals physical damage to an enemy equal to 120% of the owner's physical armor.
Every time the unit's target is killed, the unit's physical armor is increased by 6500 for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
